scope: Public, reachable repositories in the Calder Wong GitHub account that are Hapa entry points, nodes, apps, registries, operator surfaces, or clearly labeled experiments.

publicationStatus.source: GitHub public-repository API plus direct HTTP reachability audit

nodes.name: hapa
nodes.role: Front-door app and repo map for Hapa.

nodes.name: hapa-awesome
nodes.role: Canonical public repository directory and first-entry guide for the Hapa ecosystem.

nodes.name: hapa-node-atlas
nodes.role: Public visual atlas and GitHub Pages brochure for Hapa nodes and app surfaces.

nodes.name: hapa-graphify
nodes.role: Local-first graph compiler and explorer for Hapa sources, nodes, protocols, boards, and memory systems.

nodes.name: hapa-scroll-site
nodes.role: Scroll-driven public ecosystem brochure with cinematic transitions and explorable Hapa Cards.

nodes.name: overwatch
nodes.role: Operations spine, source index, task inbox, protocols, and runbooks.

nodes.name: hapa-worldbuilding-wiki
nodes.role: Canonical Markdown graph for lore, systems, cards, nodes, and publication boundaries.

nodes.name: hapa-quest-keeper
nodes.role: Consolidated board overview and board coverage auditor.

nodes.name: hapa-overwatch-kanban
nodes.role: Reusable append-only Kanban/event-log board engine.

nodes.name: hapa-telemetry-node
nodes.role: Discovery, health, launcher, and capability status surface.

nodes.name: hapa-dev-proto
nodes.role: Main local-first Hapa AG app lineage.

nodes.name: hapa-catalog-node
nodes.role: Agent-native retail and distribution node with Card Multiverse, Storefront, Operator Shells, and governed analytics.

nodes.name: CardAppPrototype
nodes.role: Reference card application and Hapa Avatar Bank prototype.

nodes.name: hapa-space
nodes.role: Unity Black Horizon fleet MVP.

nodes.name: hapa-character-sheet
nodes.role: Local-first professional character sheet, resume, skill codex, lineage dossier, and desktop/API app over Hapa Second Brain.

nodes.role: Local chat and workroom app.

nodes.name: hapa-wiki-viewer
nodes.role: Local app for browsing the Markdown wiki.

nodes.name: hapa-living-comic
nodes.role: Story panel and media-backed narrative surface.

nodes.name: hapa-spaceship-desktop-hijack
nodes.role: Janus/spaceship desktop surface prototype.

nodes.name: hapa-wisdom-studio
nodes.role: Card-guided writing, source-labeled story evidence, and reversible revision workbench.
nodes.status: Working MVP; Overwind publication adapter planned.

nodes.name: hapa-avatar-builder
nodes.role: Avatar Card, Tarot Library/Draw, and media embodiment workbench.
nodes.status: Canonical local checkout; not a stable release.

nodes.name: hapa-roomlet
nodes.role: Lightweight participant client for Avatar Builder Tarot rooms.
nodes.status: Working local prototype; distinct-network and signed-release proof pending.

nodes.name: hapa-subscriber-app
nodes.role: Static subscriber-experience UI sketch.
nodes.status: First-pass static prototype; no service, persistence, Card connection, or commerce authority.

nodes.name: hapa-language
nodes.role: Local-first multilingual learning world built around provenance-bearing Meaning Cards.
nodes.status: Verified Prototype 0.1 across local UI, API, and CLI; ten bundled Cards remain candidate/inference and are not accepted for teaching.

nodes.name: hapa-second-brain
nodes.role: Local knowledge database and operator UI.

nodes.name: hapa-lore-node
nodes.role: Chronicle and canon search service.

nodes.name: hapa-lance-node
nodes.role: Projection and indexing layer for chunks, cards, embeddings, and multimodal records.

nodes.name: hapa-wiki-growth-agent
nodes.role: Bounded wiki expansion and draft generation workflow.

nodes.name: hapa-second-brain-node
nodes.role: Private memory, retrieval, turn mining, provenance, and capability discovery node.
nodes.status: Active local/private; public repository excludes the private corpus.

nodes.name: hapa-mlx-station
nodes.role: Apple Silicon media-generation station.

nodes.name: hapa-llada-node
nodes.role: Local LLaDA/MLX completion node.

nodes.name: mtplx
nodes.role: Apple Silicon native MTP speculative decoding experiments.

nodes.name: hapa-drama
nodes.role: Voice synthesis, narration, and voice profile node.

nodes.name: hapa-lito
nodes.role: Image-to-3D generation and 3D asset provenance node.

nodes.name: hapa-avatar-node
nodes.role: Avatar/phamiliar lineage generation node.

nodes.name: hapa-song-registry
nodes.role: Songs, lyrics, timing, and music metadata registry.

nodes.name: hapa-luminastem-station
nodes.role: 3D/audio stem visualization prototype.

nodes.name: hapa-trellis
nodes.role: Hapa-owned image-to-3D queue, provenance, Asset Card, and adapter layer around separately owned Trellis runtimes.
nodes.status: Phase 0/1 prototype; stub parity is not model-access or model-quality proof.

nodes.name: hapa-agent-registry-node
nodes.role: Local agent registry and avatar job broker.

nodes.name: hapa-keys-node
nodes.role: Local key vault and auth boundary node.

nodes.name: hapa-janus-world-node

nodes.name: hapa-overwind-node

nodes.status: Universal Card Plane v1 released; other surfaces remain bounded.

nodes.status: Lovable local MVP; no arbitrary remote attack execution.

nodes.role: Operational Kanban/task node.

nodes.role: Historical Hapa visualizer experiment retained for archaeology.
